description: Hook pattern catalog for Digischola personal-brand suite. Source of truth for tier system. Seed via `python3 scripts/hook_lib.py sync-from-post-writer`.

patterns.name: What if I told you [common belief] is completely wrong?
patterns.formula: What if I told you [common belief] is completely wrong?
examples: What if I told you that sending ad traffic to your homepage is burning 80% of your daily budget?
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #1, best_for: Contrarian insights, LP audits

patterns.name: I stopped [common practice]. My [metric] finally started lan
patterns.formula: I stopped [common practice]. My [metric] finally started landing.
examples: I stopped building complex Meta ad structures for SMBs. Client CPA finally dropped below $15.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #2, best_for: Counterintuitive lessons

patterns.name: One [specific thing] completely shifted how I think about [t
patterns.formula: One [specific thing] completely shifted how I think about [topic].
examples: One 15-min Claude audit completely shifted how I write landing page headlines.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #3, best_for: AI-workflow posts

patterns.name: The hidden reason your [asset] is failing
patterns.formula: The hidden reason your [asset] is failing.
examples: The hidden reason your $30/day ad campaigns are failing (and it has nothing to do with your creative).
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #4, best_for: Diagnosis posts

patterns.name: [Common advice] is wrong. Here is what actually works:
patterns.formula: [Common advice] is wrong. Here is what actually works:
examples: "Run more ads" is terrible advice for a low-converting landing page. Here is what actually drives revenue:
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #5, best_for: Debate-sparking takes

patterns.name: Stop trying to [common goal]. Seriously
patterns.formula: Stop trying to [common goal]. Seriously.
examples: Stop trying to scale your freelance practice to 10 clients. Seriously.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #6, best_for: Freelance-ops posts

patterns.name: The best [professionals] I know barely use [common tool]
patterns.formula: The best [professionals] I know barely use [common tool].
examples: The most profitable solo operators I know barely use Upwork, despite my Top Rated status.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #7, best_for: Solo ops, pricing

patterns.name: [Common practice] is highly overrated. Focus on [alternative
patterns.formula: [Common practice] is highly overrated. Focus on [alternative] instead.
examples: Daily posting is highly overrated for freelancers. Focus on deep LP audits instead.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #8, best_for: Strategy reframes

patterns.name: [Metric] more [outcome]. Here is what I changed
patterns.formula: [Metric] more [outcome]. Here is what I changed.
examples: 188% more Meta sales for Thrive Retreats. Here is what I changed on one landing page.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #9, best_for: Case studies

patterns.name: [Metric] increase. From one [small change]. Here is what I d
patterns.formula: [Metric] increase. From one [small change]. Here is what I did.
examples: 65% more registrations for ISKM Singapore. From one headline tweak. Here is what I did.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #10, best_for: Small-lever wins

patterns.name: How a [$small budget] generated [specific outcome] in [timef
patterns.formula: How a [$small budget] generated [specific outcome] in [timeframe].
examples: How a $20/day Facebook budget generated 45 qualified wellness leads in 14 days.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #11, best_for: Small-budget paid media

patterns.name: [Number] inbound leads. Zero outreach. Here is the system
patterns.formula: [Number] inbound leads. Zero outreach. Here is the system.
examples: 12 high-ticket wellness leads. Zero cold emails. Here is the system I built from Gurugram.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #12, best_for: Funnel / solo ops

patterns.name: I was sitting in [place], staring at [problem]
patterns.formula: I was sitting in [place], staring at [problem].
examples: I was sitting at my desk in Gurugram, staring at a wellness client's $10,000 ad spend that produced zero sales.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #13, best_for: Long-form lessons

patterns.name: The call lasted [duration]. I knew by minute [number] it was
patterns.formula: The call lasted [duration]. I knew by minute [number] it was over.
examples: The discovery call lasted 10 minutes. I knew by minute two that their conversion funnel was broken.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #14, best_for: Client craft (inside solo ops)

patterns.name: It was supposed to be a quick [task]. It turned into [bigger
patterns.formula: It was supposed to be a quick [task]. It turned into [bigger outcome].
examples: It was supposed to be a quick LP audit. It turned into a strategy that salvaged their entire quarter.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #15, best_for: Scope-creep stories

patterns.name: The [notification] came through at [time]. Everything change
patterns.formula: The [notification] came through at [time]. Everything changed.
examples: The Stripe notification came through at 11 PM. The new checkout flow was finally working.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #16, best_for: Win stories

patterns.name: What is the worst [industry] advice you have ever received?
patterns.formula: What is the worst [industry] advice you have ever received?
examples: What is the absolute worst conversion rate advice you have received?
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #17, best_for: Community / engagement

patterns.name: [Role]: What do you wish you knew before [milestone]?
patterns.formula: [Role]: What do you wish you knew before [milestone]?
examples: Solopreneurs: What do you wish you knew before taking your first international client?
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #18, best_for: Solo-ops community

patterns.name: Have you ever noticed that [observation]?
patterns.formula: Have you ever noticed that [observation]?
examples: Have you ever noticed that the ugliest landing pages often convert the highest?
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #19, best_for: Contrarian LP craft

patterns.name: What is a best practice in [field] that you abandoned?
patterns.formula: What is a best practice in [field] that you abandoned?
examples: What is a Meta Ads "best practice" you completely abandoned this year?
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #20, best_for: Peer debate

patterns.name: [Number] things I would do differently if I were starting to
patterns.formula: [Number] things I would do differently if I were starting today.
examples: 5 things I would do differently if I were launching my solo freelance business today.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #21, best_for: Freelance ops

patterns.name: [Number] [niche] mistakes I see every week (and how to fix t
patterns.formula: [Number] [niche] mistakes I see every week (and how to fix them).
examples: 3 landing page mistakes I see every week on $50/day ad budgets (and how to fix them).
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #22, best_for: LP craft, paid media

patterns.name: A [number]-step framework to achieve [outcome]
patterns.formula: A [number]-step framework to achieve [outcome].
examples: A 4-step framework to diagnose any underperforming Meta campaign using AI in 20 minutes.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #23, best_for: Frameworks, AI workflow

patterns.name: [Number] lessons from [high-volume experience]
patterns.formula: [Number] lessons from [high-volume experience].
examples: 7 hard lessons from managing $1B in ad spend at Google (applied to $500/mo SMB budgets).
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #24, best_for: Credentials + value

patterns.name: I almost gave up on [pursuit] [time] ago
patterns.formula: I almost gave up on [pursuit] [time] ago.
examples: I almost gave up on international freelancing three years ago. Here is why I stayed.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #25, best_for: Origin stories, solo ops

patterns.name: This is the post I have been avoiding writing
patterns.formula: This is the post I have been avoiding writing.
examples: This is the post I have been avoiding writing about the real economics of solo agency margins.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #26, best_for: High-trust moments

patterns.name: I do not have [topic] completely figured out. But here is wh
patterns.formula: I do not have [topic] completely figured out. But here is what I know.
examples: I do not have AI entirely figured out. But here is what I am learning about using Claude for ad copy.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #27, best_for: AI-as-theme posts

patterns.name: My biggest [professional] failure taught me more than any wi
patterns.formula: My biggest [professional] failure taught me more than any win.
examples: Losing a major AU client taught me more about clear communication than any successful contract.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #28, best_for: Lessons, client craft

patterns.name: [Time] ago, I had [low metric]. Today, [high metric]
patterns.formula: [Time] ago, I had [low metric]. Today, [high metric].
examples: 5 years ago, I was struggling to find local clients. Today, I serve hospitality brands globally from India.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #29, best_for: Origin, credentials

patterns.name: It took me [time] to learn this. Save yourself the time
patterns.formula: It took me [time] to learn this. Save yourself the time.
examples: It took me 6 years to learn how to structure an Upwork profile for inbound leads. Save yourself the time.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #30, best_for: Teaching, freelance ops

patterns.name: What I learned after [high-volume action] in [timeframe]
patterns.formula: What I learned after [high-volume action] in [timeframe].
examples: What I learned after auditing 100 event landing pages in 90 days.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #31, best_for: Volume-earned insights

patterns.name: [Number] years of [industry] lessons compressed into one pos
patterns.formula: [Number] years of [industry] lessons compressed into one post.
examples: 4 years of solo operator lessons compressed into one post.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #32, best_for: Evergreen pinned-post candidate

patterns.name: [Target role]: stop treating [X] like an afterthought
patterns.formula: [Target role]: stop treating [X] like an afterthought.
examples: SMB owners: stop treating your landing page copy like an afterthought.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #33, best_for: Direct client-facing

patterns.name: If you are in [industry] and not using [tool/method], you ar
patterns.formula: If you are in [industry] and not using [tool/method], you are [losing thing].
examples: If you are running performance ads and not using AI to analyze post-launch data, you are leaving money on the table.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #34, best_for: AI integration + paid media

patterns.name: Before you [action], read this
patterns.formula: Before you [action], read this.
examples: Before you increase your Meta ad budget, read this.
patterns.notes: From post-writer/references/hook-library.md row #35, best_for: Preemptive warnings
